message:
feat(fwc): add availability_fact and silent_fallback to mesh and install JSON outputs

Introduce explicit availability_fact objects in mesh availability (live and
offline), mesh explain-availability, mesh repair-hints, and install (both
verify-only and live) JSON responses. Each fact includes a state tag
(available, degraded, unavailable, unknown, offline-planning-only,
local-verification-only), an authoritative scope, a silent_fallback=false
field proving the response did not silently degrade, and a human-readable
explanation of what the state means.

Add availability helper functions: mesh_live_availability_fact (maps
ObservedRuntimeState to availability), mesh_offline_availability_fact
(zone-aware offline planning), install_verify_only_availability_fact
(local verification scope), install_unknown_live_availability_fact
(post-install status unavailable). Derive Clone+Copy on
PreparedPackageSourceKind. Add selection_mode and silent_fallback fields
to all source_selection and offline_readiness JSON objects.

Add unit test for degraded-state mesh availability response verifying
availability_fact.state="degraded" and repair hints. Add assertions for
availability_fact and silent_fallback in existing install verify-only tests.

Also includes rustfmt normalization of assert! macro formatting in
doc_playbooks test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
